headline: Lisa Su Hosts Howard Lutnick As Commerce Department Highlights 'Gold Standard' American Tech Stack: AMD CEO Appreciates The 'Open Dialogue'
summary: On Thursday, Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. CEO Lisa Su hosted Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick for a key discussion with industry leaders. US Doubles Down On Semiconductor Leadership Taking to X, the U.S. Commerce Department said that Lutnick met leaders from the Semiconductor Industry Association. "The American tech stack is the gold standard," the Commerce Department wrote, noting U.S. firms dominate high-value segments such as chip architecture and AI compute.
